data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"b885-e9e8","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T17:45:04Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Fix-Bug Behavioral Drift Prevention: Scope-Drift
